bird.name: Barau's petrel
bird.summary: Barau's petrel (Pterodroma baraui) is a medium-sized gadfly petrel from the family Procellariidae. Its main breeding site is the island of…

relations.subject: Barau's petrel
relations.evidence: It has a highly restricted breeding range and has suffered hunting pressure in the past
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: Barau's petrel
relations.evidence: While the shooting of the species has now been stopped, and the population seems to have recovered, it is currently threatened by introduced species (especially feral cats, who threaten both chicks and adults) and light pollution
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
